title: DeathMessageV77
description: Customize & personalize death messages for a unique player experience!
body:
# ➤ DeathMessageV77 – Custom Death Messages (Paper 1.21.11)

💀 **Transform Deaths into Entertainment!** 💀
Say goodbye to boring vanilla death messages! With **DeathMessageV77**, every death tells a unique story — PvP kills, mob deaths, environmental hazards, boss encounters, and more. Fully configurable, reload-friendly, and built specifically for Paper 1.21.11.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2e55e449d33e0c79975aaf3b29f370da5e15967_0.webp)

🎉 **Join the Community!** 🎉
💡 Suggest features, get help, or show off your custom configs.
👥 We're growing fast — be part of **Pushkraj's plugin community!**
🔗 **Discord:** [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/AE2zZwzwAy)

---

## 🌟 Features

**💬 Death Messages**
- Custom messages for every death cause in Minecraft 1.21.11
- Multiple messages per cause — one picked at random each death
- No two causes share the same messages — every death feels unique
- Suppresses vanilla Minecraft death messages

**⚔️ PvP Detection**
- Separate messages for melee, ranged (bow, crossbow, trident), and explosion kills
- `%distance%` placeholder shows how far away the killer was on ranged kills
- Weapon name auto-resolved from the killer's main hand, including custom item names

**🐛 PvE & Environmental**
- Mob kill messages with `%killer%` showing the exact mob name
- Full environmental coverage — fall, fire, lava, drown, suffocate, void, cactus, berries, powder snow, cramming, wither, poison, starve, lightning, magic, dragon breath, sonic boom, world border

**👑 Boss Kills**
- Unique message lists when a player kills the Wither, Ender Dragon, Elder Guardian, or Warden

**🔥 Kill Streaks**
- Configurable streak milestones — broadcast at 3, 5, 10 kills and beyond
- Streak resets on death

**🤝 Assist & Revenge**
- First assist credit — shoutouts the last player who damaged the victim
- Revenge kill detection — special message when you kill whoever killed you last

**📢 Broadcast Control**
- Configurable block radius — only nearby players see the death message
- Killer and victim always notified regardless of radius

**🎬 Death Title Screen**
- Flashes a configurable title and subtitle directly to the dead player's screen

**🔊 Death Sound**
- Configurable sound, volume, and pitch on every death
- Supports any `org.bukkit.Sound` name

**🛠️ Placeholders**
- Built-in: `%player%` `%killer%` `%weapon%` `%world%` `%distance%` `%dropped_item%`
- PlaceholderAPI soft-depend with custom expansion: `%dmv77_deaths%` `%dmv77_last_cause%` `%dmv77_last_killer%`

**🎨 Formatting**
- Full `&` color code support in every message
- Per-cause enable/disable toggles in `config.yml`

**🔗 Discord Webhook**
- Post every death message to a Discord channel via webhook URL
- Async by default — never lags the server
- Per-cause ignore list so you control what gets posted

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download `DeathMessageV77.jar`
2. Drop it in your `/plugins/` folder
3. Start your server — `config.yml` generates automatically
4. Customize messages in `config.yml`
5. Run `/dmv77 reload` to apply changes instantly

---

## 🧪 Example Messages

```
%killer% ended %player%'s journey with a %weapon%.
%player% was sniped by %killer% from %distance% blocks away.
%player% forgot that lava and swimming don't mix.
%player% was no match for the Warden's sonic boom.
%killer% is on a 5 kill streak — someone stop them!
```

---

## ⚙️ Requirements

- Paper 1.21.11
- Java 21+
- PlaceholderAPI *(optional)*

---

## 👑 Made by Pushkraj

🌍 **More from me:** [About Me](https://pushkra.netlify.app/)
💬 **Need help or ideas?** Join the Discord! [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/AE2zZwzwAy)

🚀 Power up your Minecraft server with **DeathMessageV77 — where every death tells a story!**
